chunks.title: Sheba's Rebellion
chunks.reason: Describes the start of Sheba's revolt and the division between Israel and Judah.

chunks.title: David's Actions at Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Narrates David's treatment of his concubines and the delay in Amasa gathering troops.

chunks.title: Pursuit of Sheba and Death of Amasa
chunks.reason: Details the chase for Sheba and Joab's ambush and killing of Amasa.

chunks.title: Siege of Abel Beth-Maacah
chunks.reason: Covers the siege, the wise woman's negotiation with Joab, and Sheba's execution.

chunks.title: David's Officials
chunks.reason: Lists the key administrative and military leaders serving King David.
